title: OC2R: Addon Core
description: This is a "Library" for all my addons to OC2R
body:
Welcome to **OC2R: Addon Core**.  This is a library addon for all of my mod integrations that we will be doing for **OpenComputers II: Reimagined**.  If you would like to see a mod supported, or do a pull request yourself, we are more then free for people to add their own.



Our Discord server:

https://discord.gg/cVGFBcZf4A




We use the following server provider:
![https://serversforyou.com/aff.php?aff=8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5451347b0e999f706728598b171f3129319edcfd.png)
